svg.title: Laptop Price Predictor — #1 Private Leaderboard
svg.desc: Animated banner for the laptop price prediction ML project

rect.style: animation:typeRC 4s steps(1,end) infinite;;fill:rgb(13, 17, 23);stroke:none;color:rgb(0, 0, 0);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

svg.text: Roberto Cantero · The Bridge ML Bootcamp · 2025
